creator: Various
description: LibriVox recording of Short Poetry Collection 188 by Various. This is a collection of 35 poems read in English by LibriVox volunteers for January 2019. It includes: Beyond the Veil , by Henry Vaughan The Cell , by John Thelwall Cossack's Winter-song , by Friedrich Rückert Dream-Land , by Edgar Allan Poe I Dream’d in a Dream , by Walt Whitman Ecce Homo , by Ernest Hartley Coleridge Elegy , by John Collings Squire Epistle to my Brother George , by John Keats The Fool Errant , by Amy Lowell Gathering the Cocoons , by Frédéric Mistral God of the Open Air , by Henry van Dyke Grandmother's Story of Bunker Hill Battle , by Oliver Wendell Holmes, Sr. Hieroglyphicum in Futuro , by Anonymous If I Could But Forget , by Paul Laurence Dunbar It Was a Famous Victory , by Franklin Pierce Adams Jabberwocky , by Lewis Carroll The Last Revolutionary , by Jesse Erskine Dow My Country , by Dorothea Mackellar Old , by Paul Laurence Dunbar On This Day I Complete My Thirty-sixth Year , by George Gordon, Lord Byron Pan , by Oscar Wilde Poetry , by Claude McKay A Poor Wayfaring Man of Grief , by James Montgomery Regeneration , by Henry Vaughan Robin Hood , by Bessie Rayner Parkes To Rosemounde. A Balade , by Geoffrey Chaucer Sephina , by Walter De la Mare Sir Lancelot Du Lake , by Unknown The Source of Slavery , by John Thelwall Stanzas on Hearing for Certainty that We Were to be Tried for High Treason , by John Thelwall To My Brothers , by John Keats Under the Willows , by James Russell Lowell The Vast Hour , by Genevieve Taggard The Waterfall , by Henry Vaughan We Wear the Mask , by Paul Laurence Dunbar For further information, including links to online text, reader information, RSS feeds, CD cover or other formats (if available), please go to the LibriVox catalog page for this recording. For more free audio books or to become a volunteer reader, visit LibriVox.org . M4B Audiobook (57MB)
